Project: Quest
Institution: CNI
Status: Em desenvolvimento
Type: PHP/MySQL educational platform

Summary:
Quest is a PHP application for teachers and school staff to manage questions, assemble exams, export them as PDF, exchange internal messages, and control a Xerox workflow for printing. The repository also includes backup infrastructure, user profile defaults for exam creation, and a broader exam authoring flow with dedicated library/model pages.

Primary areas:
- `dashboard.php`: simplified home dashboard with quick access to questions, exams, and Xerox.
- `questions.php`: decision hub for the questions area.
- `question-bank.php`: searchable bank of existing questions.
- `question-editor.php`: dedicated editor for creating and revising questions.
- `exam-library.php`: central entrypoint for the exams area.
- `exam-models.php`: dedicated page for ready-to-use exam models.
- `exam-model-preview.php`: preview of simulated model exams before use.
- `exam-create.php`: first step for exam metadata and setup.
- `exams.php`: exam assembly and saved exam management.
- `exam-preview.php`: print preview and Xerox submission entrypoint.
- `exam-pdf.php`: PDF export route with browser-first rendering and safe fallback handling.
- `xerox.php`: Xerox panel for teachers, operators, and admins.
- `users.php`: role management for `master_admin`.
- `profile.php`: per-user default data panel used to prefill exam creation.
- `messages.php`: internal inbox for admin, Xerox, and users.
- `backup.php`: backup management page.

Current behavior:
- Supports authentication, logout, and password reset flow.
- Uses four roles: `master_admin`, `local_admin`, `user`, and `xerox`.
- Includes a top-level user profile panel with defaults for teacher, discipline, component, class, school, subtitle, and header logos.
- Allows admins to authorize Xerox operators.
- Allows teachers to send exams to Xerox, cancel a pending send, and resend after completion.
- Allows Xerox operators to accept, move to in-progress, and finalize printing jobs.
- Allows users to send internal messages to the administrator and, when available, to Xerox.
- Allows the administrator to answer users, send direct messages, and send broadcast notices to all users.
- Allows recipients to dismiss notification toasts and delete inbox items.
- Supports public and private questions with filters, favorites, cloning, and usage tracking.
- Supports multiple choice, discursive, drawing, and true/false question types.
- Preserves richer pasted content for question authoring, including improved handling for mathematics formatting cases.
- Builds exams from selected questions and exports them to PDF.
- Includes a separate exams library, exam models page, model preview flow, and a streamlined exam creation page.
- Uses an A4-oriented exam renderer with official school header, logo support, configurable header metadata, footer code, and embedded `Poppins Black` for the school name.
- Splits long exam content into multiple rendered pages and applies stricter footer protection to reduce clipping in generated PDFs.
- Includes base backup services and scripts for local/manual and future Drive-based backups.
- Uses updated favicon assets from `/favicon` with SVG, PNG, manifest, and purple theme color `#4f2ec9`.

Important files:
- `includes/exam_document_renderer.php`: exam HTML/PDF renderer, A4 layout, header, pagination, and print styling.
- `includes/xerox_repository.php`: Xerox workflow repository functions and status transitions.
- `includes/messages_repository.php`: internal messaging, broadcast, reply, and inbox helpers.
- `includes/exam_metadata.php`: exam metadata defaults, parsing, and user-profile-aware exam prefills.
- `includes/backup_repository.php`: backup generation and logging helpers.
- `includes/question_helpers.php`: question content normalization and formatting helpers.
- `database_geral_atualizado.sql`: full schema/reference SQL with current seed users.
- `history.txt`: dated project change log.

Defaults and assumptions:
- The default school header is `COLÉGIO ESTADUAL CÍVICO-MILITAR TANCREDO DE ALMEIDA NEVES`.
- The default school subtitle is `ENSINO FUNDAMENTAL, MÉDIO E PROFISSIONALIZANTE`.
- The default exam label is `AVALIAÇÃO TRIMESTRAL`.
- The default exam logo URL is `https://cdn.worldvectorlogo.com/logos/colegio-estadual-c-vico-militar-tancredo-de-almeida-neves.svg`.
- The embedded font asset for the school name is `assets/fonts/Poppins-Black.ttf`.
- The favicon manifest and theme color currently use `#4f2ec9`.

Notes for LLMs:
- Prefer preserving the current role model and Xerox permissions.
- Prefer `database_geral_atualizado.sql` as the SQL reference.
- Prefer the dedicated pages (`question-bank.php`, `question-editor.php`) instead of reintroducing modal-based question creation.
- Prefer `profile.php` as the source of recurring user defaults for new exam creation.
- Prefer `messages.php` and `includes/messages_repository.php` for any future internal communication changes.
- Prefer maintaining preview/PDF visual parity for exam rendering work.
